assertions.rationale: General knowledge of Duende BFF would include AddBff()

assertions.assertion: Uses ConfigureOpenIdConnect with Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType='code', and SaveTokens=true
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would likely use the older manual AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() pattern rather than the v4 ConfigureOpenIdConnect fluent API
Standard OIDC knowledge includes offline_access for refresh tokens

assertions.assertion: Middleware order is UseRouting -> UseAuthentication -> UseBff -> UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the exact placement of UseBff() between UseAuthentication and UseAuthorization

assertions.assertion: Does NOT manually call AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() — uses the v4 fluent API instead
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would very likely use the older v3-style manual registration which is the pattern found in most online examples
